name: eo-microsaas-dev
description: EO MicroSaaS Dev plugin for students — 7-pillar development workflow. 13 slash commands (plan, code, review, score, bridge-gaps, ship, debug, retro, guide, status, dev-start, dev-repair, github) + 11 skills. One-shot bootstrap via /eo-dev-start (reads EO-Brain phases 0-4, plan-mode gated, asks one 4-option question for GitHub intent). GitHub admin via /eo-github (create / point-existing / guided / audit; MCP-only; plan-aware; trunk-vs-dual branch strategy; best-practices settings applied; branch protection deferred to post-first-CI). Surgical repair via /eo-dev-repair. 5-hat scoring with student calibration (90+ ship gate). Cross-session resumability via /eo-guide with local-only-bootstrapped routing. Self-improvement loop via .claude/lessons.md. MENA-specific checks (Arabic RTL, mobile 375px). BRD traceability from EO-Brain Phase 5.
